evals.prompt: 请用 IDT/Inspur 公司风格做一个 6 页 PPTX 操作手册，内容是根据三张系统截图讲解从登录、查询到导出报表的流程。截图必须保持原始界面语义，不要重画成插画或网页模板。
expected_behavior: Maps the deck plan to registered layouts, especially Screenshot Step for screenshot-led pages.
Preserves screenshots as evidence assets with programmatic crop/scale instead of redesigning them.
Uses the fixed IDT/Inspur white, blue, black theme and YaHei editable text.
Runs or explicitly requests the idtpptx QA helper before delivery.

evals.prompt: 请用 idtpptx 做一份 15 页公司内部评审 PPTX，主题是 AI 代码采纳统计。已有公司模板，除非确实做不到，不要从 0 生成。
expected_behavior: Uses assets/templates/inspur-pragmatic-template-v1.pptx as the starting package.
Follows the base pptx editing workflow to duplicate, delete, reorder, and replace content in template slides.
Does not use PptxGenJS/from-scratch generation as the default route just because this is a new deck.
Reuses template master/layout logo and media relationships where possible instead of embedding a fresh logo image on every slide.
Runs the QA helper and treats PowerPoint repair prompts or attachment-like image artifacts as delivery blockers.

evals.prompt: 请做一份方案对比 PPTX：对比 A、B、C 三种实施路径，说明适用场景、成本、风险和推荐结论，风格要适合内部评审。
expected_behavior: Chooses Comparison Table or Choice rather than inventing colorful marketing cards.
Keeps table text readable, vertically middle-aligned, and inside the company logo safe area.
Chooses one horizontal alignment mode for the whole table instead of mixing centered and left-aligned cells.
Uses only approved theme tokens and avoids warm marketing palettes or multi-theme color sets.
Treats the recommendation as a restrained internal conclusion, not a sales slogan.

evals.prompt: 我有一份暗色科技风外部 PPTX，请帮我改成 IDT/Inspur 内部汇报风格，同时保留原有业务逻辑和关键图表。
expected_behavior: Recognizes dark tech styling as non-default theme drift unless the user explicitly accepts that exception.
Normalizes editable slides toward white canvas, brand blue accents, black body text, and YaHei fonts.
Does not blindly preserve external theme fonts, dark backgrounds, neon fills, or decorative borders.
Uses the QA helper theme drift warnings as evidence for pages that still need manual review.

evals.prompt: 请做一份内部讨论用 PPTX，主题是 AI 代码采纳与入库归因机制复盘。可以先做初版，但最终 PPT 里不要出现你怎么规划 PPT、后续怎么补截图数据、这轮先不展开这些生成过程说明。
expected_behavior: Keeps slide text reader-facing and business-facing, even when the deck is an initial discussion version.
Removes the whole 初版目标与讨论范围 or deck-production setup page unless the user explicitly asks for that page.
Does not include phrases like 可讨论的结构草稿, 后续补充数据和截图, 本轮先不展开, or 不追求最终视觉定稿.
Uses assumptions, scope boundaries, risks, or next steps only when they belong to the project rather than the deck-production process.
Runs the QA helper so deck-drafting process leakage is checked before delivery.

evals.prompt: 请做一页端到端数据链路 PPTX：插件采集、事实上报、Commit Report、归因任务、日汇总事实、管理端展示。页面要是终稿效果，不要文字互相盖住，也不要为了塞下六个步骤把字号压到看不清。
expected_behavior: Uses a Process / Workflow Summary layout only if all six stages remain readable.
Keeps each process card title and body in separate zones; wrapped English titles do not overlap Chinese body text.
Uses Chinese-first process labels, such as 提交报告（Commit Report） only when Commit Report is the actual module name.
Shortens labels, splits the workflow, or switches to a compact table when six cards cannot fit safely in one row.
Runs visual QA and treats any text overlap as a blocking readability issue.

evals.prompt: 请做一页服务端归因流程 PPTX，原始材料里有 generated / accepted / candidateLines、exact / partial、daily facts、line match、rename、attribution job、sourceTimestamp、occurrenceIndex 等词。最终页面要适合公司内部汇报，不要显得中英混杂。
expected_behavior: Uses Chinese as the primary wording for normal labels and explanations.
Keeps genuine technical nouns such as git and linux in English, even when lowercase.
Rewrites generated / accepted / candidateLines as 生成行 / 采纳行 / 候选行数 or another clear Chinese metric phrase.
Rewrites exact / partial, daily facts, line match, rename, and attribution job into Chinese unless they are exact product or code names.
Keeps code fields such as sourceTimestamp and occurrenceIndex only when needed for technical precision, paired with Chinese explanations.
Runs the QA helper and treats Chinese-first wording warnings as pages needing review.

evals.prompt: 请做一页一句话结论 PPTX：顶部是一条浅灰背景结论框，下面是目标、范围、结果三个卡片。结论文案和三个卡片正文都比较长，要求文字在背景框和卡片内自动换行，不要跑到背景框外面。
expected_behavior: Wraps long conclusion text inside the light-gray conclusion bar with visible padding.
Keeps each card body text box physically inside its card background instead of spanning across adjacent cards.
Shortens copy, increases container height, or splits content when text cannot fit.
Runs visual QA and treats container text overflow or text-box-fit warnings as pages needing review.

evals.prompt: 请做一页“本次评审要回答的三个问题”PPTX，使用三个浅灰卡片：能说明什么、还缺什么、先补哪块。每个卡片正文都是较长中文句子。要求正文在卡片内水平和垂直方向都不能超出外框，不能跨到相邻卡片。
expected_behavior: Builds each visible card first and places title/body text in inner text boxes within that card.
Wraps long card body sentences inside the card instead of creating row-wide text boxes.
Shortens the sentence, increases the card height, reduces cards per row, or splits the slide if text cannot fit at readable size.
Runs the QA helper and treats text-box-fit/container overflow warnings as requiring rendered slide inspection.

evals.prompt: 请做一页“精确匹配候选：三层硬条件缺一不可”的 PPTX，用 4 列表格说明层级、判断内容、通过标准、业务含义。表格正文比较短但有解释句，要求单元格垂直居中，水平对齐整表统一，不要出现有的列居中、有的列左对齐。
expected_behavior: Uses a registered Comparison Table layout rather than a card grid.
Sets all non-empty table cells to vertical-middle alignment unless a cell genuinely has paragraph/list/code-heavy content.
Chooses all-left or all-center as a table-wide horizontal mode and applies it consistently to header and body.
Does not mix centered and left-aligned cells as a visual shortcut.
Runs the QA helper and treats mixed table alignment warnings as pages needing review.

evals.prompt: 请用 idtpptx 公司模板生成一份内部评审 PPTX，可以用代码生成，但不要让页面看起来像一个小 PPT 套在大 PPT 里面，也不要每页出现两个浪潮 logo。
expected_behavior: Reuses the template or master slide chrome instead of drawing a second title bar, page marker, footer, or slide frame inside the page.
Uses one visible Inspur logo per slide unless a user-provided cover or closing reference explicitly shows otherwise.
Fills the registered template content zone at full slide scale; content is not clustered only in the upper-left with a mostly empty right side and lower half.
When code generation is unavoidable, validates the result with rendered slide images and the idtpptx QA helper's logo/content-utilization checks.
Treats duplicate visible logos as a blocking issue and content-underuse warnings as pages requiring visual redesign.

evals.prompt: 请做一份 8 页 IDT/Inspur 风格 PPTX，主题是“AI 代码采纳统计评审方案”。需要封面、章节页、正文页和对比表页。最终文件里不要出现“单击此处添加标题/副标题”这类原始占位符；章节页只保留中间蓝色章节条标题；普通正文页标题要和顶部标题区域匹配，不要标题很小但上方空间很大，也不要为了填满标题框把字号放得过大。
expected_behavior: Deletes or replaces all unused title/subtitle placeholders instead of clearing text and leaving placeholder shapes.
Keeps section divider pages to one center blue-bar title system without an extra top-left title placeholder.
Uses a compact normal content title band with about 24-30 pt title text and body content starting in the registered content zone.
Does not show PowerPoint default prompts such as 单击此处添加标题, 单击此处添加副标题, or Click to add title.
Runs the QA helper and treats placeholder/title-system blockers or warnings as issues to fix before delivery.

evals.prompt: 请用 idtpptx 做一份 10 页内部技术复盘 PPTX，内容包括一页结论、两页指标表、一页流程、一页技术架构图、两页问题排查和一页后续计划。不要让它看起来和内置 V1 模板 10 页样例基本一模一样，要保持浪潮风格但根据内容重新组合页面。
expected_behavior: Uses the V1 template for master chrome, logo, theme, and calibration rather than cloning the sample slide sequence page by page.
Reads component-system.md and composition-grammar.md before choosing page recipes.
Maps each page by content shape and chooses components such as tables, cards, process nodes, architecture nodes, and summary fields.
Uses cleaned sample slides only as specimens or fallback when the sample geometry genuinely fits.
Runs the QA helper and treats template-clone warnings as pages requiring re-planning rather than decorative changes.
